description: Task lifecycle hooks, custom template registries, and parent-child subtasks
changelog:
**Enhancements:**
- feat(init): add --registry flag for custom spec template sources (GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket). Supports marketplace mode (index.json) and direct download mode
- feat(task): add task lifecycle hooks via config.yaml (after_create, after_start, after_finish, after_archive) with TASK_JSON_PATH env var. Ships with Linear sync hook example
- feat(task): add parent-child subtask support (add-subtask, remove-subtask commands, children/parent/meta fields in task.json)
- docs(record-session): clarify archive judgment based on work status, not task.json status field
notes: Run trellis update to sync updated command templates (brainstorm subtask support, record-session improvements).
